title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Feather Bedding Set, Printed Duvet Cover King Size, Comfy Breathable Quilt Cover, Grey
features: A simple way to give your bedroom a completely new look with our Contemporary Living Up to Date Style. Smooth, Comfortable and highly durable.

Drying & Ironing Instructions: Tumble dry at low temperature. Iron at low temperature. Maximum sole-plate temperature is 110 °C. Steam ironing may be a risk.
